Liam Carter, DOB 14/03/2001, NDIS #430182905. Lives in a shared house in Footscray VIC with two housemates. Likes trains, drawing, quiet spaces; dislikes loud unexpected noise and crowds. Verbal but prefers short sentences and visual schedules. Primary disability: Autism Spectrum Disorder (Level 2). No regular medication. No known allergies. Mum (Sarah Carter, 0400 111 222) is main informal support and visits weekly. GP: Dr Nguyen, Footscray Family Clinic. Liam wants to travel independently on the train to his art class, make a couple of friends, and cook two simple meals on his own. Currently needs prompting for budgeting and gets anxious in new places. A support worker helps 6 hrs/week with community access; he sees an OT fortnightly for daily-living skills.
